name: Inactive Contact Re-engagement
description: When a contact has no activity for 60 days, creates a re-engagement task to reconnect and explore new opportunities.
descriptionAr: عند عدم وجود نشاط لجهة اتصال لمدة ٦٠ يومًا، ينشئ مهمة إعادة تواصل لاستكشاف فرص جديدة.

config.title: Re-engage: {{name}}
config.description: No activity in 60+ days. Reach out to check in and explore new opportunities.
